channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sam Ryder takes only 21 putts for a 63 and leads Texas Open
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Sam Ryder wasn't sure his neck would feel good enough for him to play Thursday in the Valero Texas Open. He found a swing and hardly missed a putt on his way to a 9-under 63 and a one-shot lead over Keith Mitchell in the final tournament before the Masters.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Djokovic, Gauff and other players ask the Grand Slam tournaments for more money and more say
item.description: Novak Djokovic, Jannik Sinner, Aryna Sabalenka and Coco Gauff are among 20 leading tennis players who signed a letter sent to the heads of the four Grand Slam tournaments seeking more prize money and a greater say in what they called “decisions that directly impact us.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UCLA's Cori Close is the AP Coach of the Year after a historic season for the top-seeded Bruins
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Cori Close, who led UCLA to its first women's Final Four during one of the best seasons in school history, was named The Associated Press Coach of the Year on Thursday. The Bruins earned the No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fencer refuses to compete against transgender opponent
item.description: Turner told NewsNation she didn’t “want to let people know that I'm OK with this and pretend like nothing's happening.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Trump again says he wants to see PGA Tour, LIV Golf merged
item.description: DORAL, Fla. (AP) — President Donald Trump arrived at his Doral resort Thursday for a LIV Golf event, shortly after reiterating to reporters aboard Air Force One that he wants to see the two men's professional tours united.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tight end Trey McBride agrees to 4-year deal with Cardinals, keeping him with team through 2029
item.description: Star tight end Trey McBride has agreed to a four-year deal with the Arizona Cardinals as the franchise locks up one of the NFL’s best young players through the 2029 season.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Patriots trade QB Milton to Cowboys, giving Dallas a new backup behind Dak Prescott
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The New England Patriots have agreed to trade quarterback Joe Milton III to the Dallas Cowboys. Milton confirmed the trade via a social media post on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: FIFA president Infantino: US to host 2031 Women’s World Cup; CONCACAF may join project
item.description: “We look forward to sharing more details and unveiling our full vision for the 2031 FIFA Women’s World Cup in the near future,” the U.S. Soccer Federation said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Miller Gardner, son of ex-Yankees star, died from carbon monoxide poisoning, officials say
item.description: Officials in Costa Rica confirmed Wednesday that the official cause of death for 14-year-old Miller Gardner was carbon monoxide poisoning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The NBA's playoff chase enters its final days. Here's a look at what's happening
item.description: It’s playoff-positioning time in the NBA. Going into Thursday, there are 89 games left in the season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees OF Brett Gardner's son died of carbon monoxide poisoning, had 'layer' on organs, officials say
item.description: Carbon monoxide poisoning was the cause of death of the teenage son of former New York Yankees outfielder Brett Gardner, authorities in Costa Rica confirmed Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Cubs, Seiya Suzuki look to stay sizzling when they return to Wrigley Field
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — Pull out the hand warmers. Seiya Suzuki is headed home to Wrigley Field at last, and he promises to be well prepared for whatever chilly elements he faces in an unpredictable Chicago spring.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Tennis legend Martina Navratilova 'fuming' after female fencer punished for refusing to take on trans athlete
item.description: Tennis legend Martina Navratilova slammed USA Fencing after Stephanie Turner took a knee in protest of a trans athlete during a fencing competiton.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cody Rhodes talks WWE Hall of Fame, makes case for brother's enshrinement
item.description: WWE star Cody Rhodes talked to Fox News Digital about the WWE Hall of Fame and who he thinks should be in. He made a case for his brother.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Houston blows past the Jazz, 143-105
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - The end of the season can't come soon enough for the Utah Jazz. Jalen Green scored 22 points, while Alperen Sengun was one assist away from a triple-double, as the Houston Rockets crushed the Jazz Wednesday night, 143-105.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ovechkin scores his 892nd career goal. He needs 2 to tie Gretzky and 3 to break the NHL record
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — Alex Ovechkin took another step closer to breaking Wayne Gretzky's NHL record by scoring his 892nd career goal in the Washington Capitals' 5-1 loss at the Carolina Hurricanes on Wednesday night. Ovechkin moved two away from tying Gretzky and three from passing him.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: All 5 starters out for exhausted Nuggets against Spurs following double-0T heartbreaker
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Denver coach Michael Malone declared all five of his starters out for the exhausted Nuggets' game against the San Antonio Spurs on Wednesday night. Denver's 140-139 double-overtime home loss to the Minnesota Timberwolves on Tuesday night played a role in Malone resting his stars.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pepperdine golfers overcome wildfires to compete in Augusta
item.description: Jeneath Wong and Eunseo Choi, two golfers from Pepperdine University, have arrived in Augusta, Georgia for the Augusta National Women's Amateur, after narrowly avoiding the recent Malibu wildfires that ravaged their campus in California.
item.dc:creator: Barclay Bishop, Fox 5

item.title: Vejmelka makes 33 saves as Utah HC stays in playoff hunt
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah is not out of the playoff hunt just yet. Karel Vejmelka made 33 saves in his 18th consecutive start in goal, as the Utah Hockey Club stayed alive in the chase for the NHL playoffs with a hard-fought 3-1 victory over Calgary Tuesday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: SF Giants listed among Forbes' most valuable MLB teams
item.description: (KRON) -- As the 2025 Major League Baseball season starts in March, Forbes released its annual list of the most valuable teams. The San Francisco Giants were listed as the fifth-most valuable team in MLB, according to Forbes' list released on March 26.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Duke and Florida move on to Final Four
item.description: Florida and Duke won their regions on Saturday, with fellow top seeds Houston and Auburn set to play on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Madison Booker and top-seeded Texas outlast SEC rival Tennessee 67-59 to reach Elite Eight
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Texas coach Vic Schaefer got the tense battle he expected between his defensive-minded Longhorns and the highest-scoring team in the country in Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Betts, top overall seed UCLA look for March Madness success in Elite Eight meeting with LSU
item.description: With back-to-back games of at least 30 points and 10 or more rebounds, UCLA center Lauren Betts certainly appears unstoppable. But, LSU has thwarted the Bruins before — in the Sweet 16 of last years women’s NCAA Tournament. They'll get a rematch on Sunday, this time in the Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC loses to defending champs in OT, 2-1
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) - Sam Bennett scored his second goal of the game off an assist from Brad Marchand at 4:18 of overtime to give the Florida Panthers a 2-1 win over the Utah Hockey Club at Amerant Bank Arena on Friday. By earning one point, Utah is now nine points behind St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
